title: peucedanum multiradiatum
intro: Peucedanum multiradiatum, also known as Chinese angelica tree or multiflora, is a perennial plant species in the carrot family that is native to China and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Peucedanum multiradiatum include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and treating respiratory and digestive issues. Peucedanum multiradiatum can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
